theme_archetype: Archetype 6: Vibrant Play (Light Theme) tuned for iPad touch usability

typography.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-[#19305a]

layout_spacing.touch_targets: min-h-[64px] min-w-[64px] (iPad standard is 44px, we go larger for kids' ease of use)

cards.base: bg-[#ffffff] rounded-[16px] shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(25,48,90,0.06)] p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center cursor-pointer transition-all duration-300 border-2 border-transparent

numpad.button: h-20 text-3xl font-black rounded-[16px] bg-[#ffffff] text-[#19305a] border-b-4 border-[#19305a]/10 hover:bg-[#7cbde8] hover:text-white hover:border-[#7cbde8] active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0 transition-all flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-[#f5a623] text-[#19305a] font-bold text-xl py-4 px-8 rounded-[16px] shadow-[0_8px_0_rgba(200,130,20,1)] hover:brightness-105 active:translate-y-2 active:shadow-none transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#19305a] text-white font-bold text-xl py-4 px-8 rounded-[16px] shadow-[0_8px_0_rgba(15,30,60,1)] hover:bg-[#254680] active:translate-y-2 active:shadow-none transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-[#c74747] text-white font-bold text-xl py-4 px-8 rounded-[16px] shadow-[0_8px_0_rgba(150,50,50,1)] hover:bg-[#e05252] active:translate-y-2 active:shadow-none transition-all

modals.content: bg-[#ffffff] rounded-[24px] shadow-2xl p-8 max-w-2xl w-full border-4 border-[#19305a]

navigation.stepper: flex items-center gap-4 text-[#19305a] font-bold text-lg mb-8

interactions_and_motion.success_state: Trigger scale-up animation with spring physics. Use bee emoji 🐝 prominently but sparingly in success alerts.
interactions_and_motion.hover: Elevate elements with soft bounces for tactile kids' interaction.

testing.requirements: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, grids) MUST have descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., 'class-card-math', 'numpad-btn-5', 'confirm-transaction-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a hybrid iPad Kiosk application. DO NOT use tiny web-standard buttons. Everything must be chunky, tactile, and easily tappable by small hands or standing adults.
Apply 'bg-[#f3f6fb]' to the root application background and use 'bg-[#ffffff]' exclusively for surface elements (cards, containers, modals) to create depth without relying on heavy shadows.
Implement the Numpad with chunky physical-feeling buttons (refer to components.numpad and components.buttons for exact box-shadow bottom-border tactile states).
Do not use generic Shadcn borders. Override Shadcn Card/Dialog components with the 16px border-radius and the specified color variables.
For the Splash Screen, feature an SVG/text logo for 'MPS' heavily utilizing the #19305a (Navy) and #f5a623 (Honey Yellow) contrast.
Analytics/Dashboard should utilize the Recharts library, applying #19305a, #7cbde8, and #f5a623 to graphs and bar charts.
Ensure the shopping cart overlay completely halts underlying interaction using the heavy backdrop-blur overlay.
